It links pages like Home, Translator, and Generator using BrowserRouter, Routes, and Route, improving performance and user experience.

items.name: Browser-extension-HR-Helper
items.description: 本项目是一款面向企业 HR 的浏览器插件，旨在提升招聘过程中人才搜索效率与精准度。  在实际招聘中，HR 往往需要反复尝试不同关键词，或通过经验判断对标公司来源，过程依赖个人经验且效率较低。本插件通过引入 AI 能力，对岗位信息进行结构化分析，帮助 HR 快速生成高质量的搜索策略

items.name: RepoRewind
items.description: By using predeterministic state-tracking, we’ve eliminated 'Merge Hell' and the 'Staging Area' entirely. It’s a zero-footprint, peer-to-peer versioning system that runs on your phone as easily as a server. Don't manage your code—just record it. It’s Git, without the Git."
